name: marknest
description: A personal Markdown blog platform prototype.

scripts.test: node tests/markdown.test.js && node tests/i18n.test.js && node tests/auth.test.js && node tests/api.test.js
scripts.check: node --check server/index.js && node --check server/app.js && node --check server/auth.js && node --check server/database.js && node --check src/api.js && node --check src/app.js
